requirement_topic.en: Uganda Market Access — UNBS PVoC / Certificate of Conformity, Q-Mark, In-Country Importer and Customs Clearance
requirement_topic.zh: 乌干达市场准入——UNBS PVoC/合格证书、Q标志、境内进口商及海关放行
requirement_topic.zht: 烏干達市場准入——UNBS PVoC/合格證書、Q標誌、境內進口商及海關放行

summary.en: Non-Ugandan manufacturers placing portable lithium batteries or power banks on the Uganda market must satisfy the following access obligations. (1) UNBS Pre-Export Verification of Conformity (PVoC) — for regulated/in-scope products, each consignment (or a registered/licensed product under the applicable route) must be verified against the relevant Uganda Standard by an appointed UNBS conformity-assessment partner before shipment, resulting in a Certificate of Conformity (CoC) that is presented at the Uganda port of entry. (2) UNBS import inspection and, where applicable, the UNBS Q-Mark / standardisation mark for products meeting the criteria. (3) In-country importer — a Uganda-established importer of record is required; the importer presents the CoC and supporting documentation, pays applicable fees, and is the local point of responsibility for customs and UNBS. (4) Customs clearance — Uganda Revenue Authority (URA) clears goods on presentation of UNBS documentation; for landlocked Uganda, goods typically transit via the ports of Mombasa (Kenya) or Dar es Salaam (Tanzania). Wireless products additionally require UCC type approval (see EMC/radio row).
summary.zh: 将便携式锂电池或移动电源投放乌干达市场的非乌干达制造商，须满足以下准入义务。（1）UNBS出口前一致性验证（PVoC）——对受监管/在范围内的产品，每一货批（或按适用路径注册/许可的产品）须在装运前由UNBS指定的合格评定合作机构依据相关乌干达标准验证，取得在乌干达入境口岸出示的合格证书（CoC）。（2）UNBS进口检验，及对符合条件产品适用的UNBS Q标志/标准化标志。（3）境内进口商——须有在乌干达设立的进口记录商；进口商出示CoC及支持文件、缴纳适用费用，并作为海关和UNBS的本地责任点。（4）海关放行——乌干达税务局（URA）凭UNBS文件放行货物；乌干达为内陆国，货物通常经蒙巴萨（肯尼亚）或达累斯萨拉姆（坦桑尼亚）港中转。无线产品还须取得UCC型号核准（见EMC/无线电行）。
summary.zht: 將便攜式鋰電池或行動電源投放烏干達市場的非烏干達製造商，須滿足以下准入義務。（1）UNBS出口前一致性驗證（PVoC）——對受監管/在範圍內的產品，每一貨批（或按適用路徑登記/許可的產品）須在裝運前由UNBS指定的合格評定合作機構依據相關烏干達標準驗證，取得在烏干達入境口岸出示的合格證書（CoC）。（2）UNBS進口檢驗，及對符合條件產品適用的UNBS Q標誌/標準化標誌。（3）境內進口商——須有在烏干達設立的進口記錄商；進口商出示CoC及支持文件、繳納適用費用，並作為海關和UNBS的本地責任點。（4）海關放行——烏干達稅務局（URA）憑UNBS文件放行貨物；烏干達為內陸國，貨物通常經蒙巴薩（肯尼亞）或達累斯薩拉姆（坦桑尼亞）港中轉。無線產品還須取得UCC型號核准（見EMC/無線電行）。

standards_or_laws: UNBS Act, Cap. 327 — Uganda National Bureau of Standards mandatory standards and import quality framework
UNBS Pre-Export Verification of Conformity (PVoC) to Standards Programme — Certificate of Conformity
Imports Inspection / UNBS Q-Mark (standardisation mark) regime
East African Community Customs Management Act (EACCMA) — customs clearance via Uganda Revenue Authority (URA)

summary.en: China's domestic market access for lithium battery products uses a different framework. CCC (China Compulsory Certification, administered by CNCA/SAMR) is mandatory for certain rechargeable battery product categories sold domestically (e.g., some mobile-phone lithium batteries). CCC is a Chinese domestic instrument and is NOT recognised by UNBS; it does not substitute for a UNBS Certificate of Conformity. There is no Chinese equivalent of a pre-export verification programme operated by a foreign standards body, nor of an in-country importer-of-record requirement imposed by the destination on Chinese domestic sales. China has no obligation equivalent to UNBS PVoC, the Q-Mark, or UCC radio approval for goods sold within China.
summary.zh: 中国国内锂电池产品市场准入采用不同框架。CCC（中国强制认证，由CNCA/SAMR管理）对某些在国内销售的可充电电池产品类别（如部分手机锂电池）为强制性。CCC属中国国内文书，不被UNBS认可，不可替代UNBS合格证书。中国没有等同于由外国标准机构运行的出口前验证计划的制度，也没有由目的地对中国国内销售施加的进口记录商要求。对于在中国境内销售的货物，中国没有等同于UNBS PVoC、Q标志或UCC无线电核准的义务。
summary.zht: 中國國內鋰電池產品市場准入採用不同框架。CCC（中國強制認證，由CNCA/SAMR管理）對某些在國內銷售的可充電電池產品類別（如部分手機鋰電池）為強制性。CCC屬中國國內文書，不被UNBS認可，不可替代UNBS合格證書。中國沒有等同於由外國標準機構運行的出口前驗證計劃的制度，也沒有由目的地對中國國內銷售施加的進口記錄商要求。對於在中國境內銷售的貨物，中國沒有等同於UNBS PVoC、Q標誌或UCC無線電核准的義務。

standards_or_laws: CCC — China Compulsory Certification (CNCA/SAMR) — domestic China market access only; not recognised in Uganda
China Customs (GACC) import/export declaration — domestic export-side procedure

gap.en: Chinese exporters to Uganda face market-access steps with no Chinese domestic equivalent: (1) UNBS PVoC verification before shipment, against the relevant Uganda Standard, producing a Certificate of Conformity per consignment or registered product — CCC certification does not transfer; (2) appointment of a Uganda-established importer of record who carries customs and UNBS responsibility; (3) UNBS import inspection at entry and, where criteria are met, Q-Mark use; (4) customs clearance via URA, with physical transit through Mombasa or Dar es Salaam given Uganda is landlocked — adding lead time and logistics documentation. Unlike the EU, there is no EPR/WEEE per-jurisdiction battery registration obligation on the exporter, and no single mark covers conformity plus radio approval — UNBS (CoC) and UCC (type approval, where wireless) are separate. Exporters should budget PVoC fees, importer arrangements, and transit logistics, and confirm whether their specific product is within the UNBS regulated/PVoC scope.
gap.zh: 中国向乌干达出口商面临在中国国内无对应的市场准入步骤：（1）装运前的UNBS PVoC验证，依据相关乌干达标准，按货批或注册产品出具合格证书——CCC认证不可转移；（2）任命在乌干达设立的进口记录商，承担海关和UNBS责任；（3）入境时的UNBS进口检验，及符合条件时使用Q标志；（4）经URA海关放行，因乌干达为内陆国，货物须经蒙巴萨或达累斯萨拉姆港实物中转——增加交付周期和物流文件。与欧盟不同，对出口商不存在EPR/WEEE分辖区电池注册义务，也没有同时涵盖一致性和无线电核准的单一标志——UNBS（CoC）和UCC（无线时的型号核准）相互独立。出口商应预算PVoC费用、进口商安排及中转物流，并确认其具体产品是否在UNBS受监管/PVoC范围内。
gap.zht: 中國向烏干達出口商面臨在中國國內無對應的市場准入步驟：（1）裝運前的UNBS PVoC驗證，依據相關烏干達標準，按貨批或登記產品出具合格證書——CCC認證不可轉移；（2）任命在烏干達設立的進口記錄商，承擔海關和UNBS責任；（3）入境時的UNBS進口檢驗，及符合條件時使用Q標誌；（4）經URA海關放行，因烏干達為內陸國，貨物須經蒙巴薩或達累斯薩拉姆港實物中轉——增加交付週期和物流文件。與歐盟不同，對出口商不存在EPR/WEEE分轄區電池登記義務，也沒有同時涵蓋一致性和無線電核准的單一標誌——UNBS（CoC）和UCC（無線時的型號核准）相互獨立。出口商應預算PVoC費用、進口商安排及中轉物流，並確認其具體產品是否在UNBS受監管/PVoC範圍內。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for regulated products — UNBS PVoC and Certificate of Conformity before/at import, UNBS import inspection, and an in-country importer of record are required before customs clearance via URA; UCC type approval applies separately for wireless products; no exporter-facing EPR/WEEE battery registration exists
mandatory_status.cn: CCC mandatory for domestically-sold products in applicable categories; no equivalent of UNBS PVoC, Certificate of Conformity, Q-Mark, in-country importer, or UCC radio approval required of Chinese exporters under Chinese law

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese portable battery and power bank exporters reach the Uganda market through the UNBS conformity route — Pre-Export Verification of Conformity producing a Certificate of Conformity, UNBS import inspection (and Q-Mark where applicable), an in-country importer of record, and URA customs clearance, with physical transit via Mombasa or Dar es Salaam because Uganda is landlocked. CCC certification does not transfer or substitute. Unlike the EU there is no exporter EPR/WEEE battery registration, and conformity (UNBS) and radio approval (UCC, for wireless) are handled by separate regulators.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国便携式电池及移动电源出口商通过UNBS一致性路径进入乌干达市场——出口前一致性验证取得合格证书、UNBS进口检验（适用时加Q标志）、境内进口记录商，以及URA海关放行，因乌干达为内陆国须经蒙巴萨或达累斯萨拉姆港实物中转。CCC认证不可转移或替代。与欧盟不同，对出口商不存在EPR/WEEE电池注册，一致性（UNBS）和无线电核准（UCC，针对无线）由不同监管机构分别处理。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國便攜式電池及行動電源出口商通過UNBS一致性路徑進入烏干達市場——出口前一致性驗證取得合格證書、UNBS進口檢驗（適用時加Q標誌）、境內進口記錄商，以及URA海關放行，因烏干達為內陸國須經蒙巴薩或達累斯薩拉姆港實物中轉。CCC認證不可轉移或替代。與歐盟不同，對出口商不存在EPR/WEEE電池登記，一致性（UNBS）和無線電核准（UCC，針對無線）由不同監管機構分別處理。

source.publisher: Uganda National Bureau of Standards (UNBS) — Imports Inspection / PVoC and Certificate of Conformity
